title: Lollapalooza 2026 Lineup: Charli XCX, Smashing Pumpkins, the xx, and Lorde Announced - Pitchfork Exclusive Details Inside.
body:
The highly anticipated Lollapalooza 2026 lineup has finally been unveiled, and music fans are abuzz with excitement. This year's festival promises to be a star-studded affair, featuring a diverse range of headlining acts that cater to a broad spectrum of musical tastes. At the forefront of the lineup are Smashing Pumpkins, the iconic alt-rock band, Charli XCX, the genre-bending pop sensation, the xx, the critically acclaimed British trio, and Lorde, the chart-topping New Zealand-born singer-songwriter. Joining these marquee acts are a slew of talented supporting artists, including Olivia Dean, Tate McRae, John Summit, and JENNIE, each bringing their unique energy and style to the festival.

While the headliners are undoubtedly the main draw for many attendees, it's the depth and breadth of the supporting lineup that truly sets Lollapalooza 2026 apart. Notable inclusions include Geese, a Brooklyn-based indie-rock outfit known for their infectious hooks and dynamic live performances; Oklou, the enigmatic French singer-songwriter whose ethereal soundscapes have captivated audiences worldwide; and Turnstile, the Baltimore-based punk-rockers whose high-energy live shows have earned them a devoted following. Other standout acts on the bill include Fakemink, a genre-bending trio from the US, Water From Your Eyes, a Chicago-based noise-rock outfit, Little Simz, the British grime artist, and Jim Legxacy, a rising star in the electronic music scene.

The Lollapalooza 2026 lineup is a testament to the festival's commitment to showcasing a diverse range of musical styles and genres. From the nostalgic alt-rock of Smashing Pumpkins to the experimental electronic soundscapes of Fakemink, there's something for every music fan at this year's festival. The inclusion of up-and-coming artists like Olivia Dean and Tate McRae also bodes well for the future of the music industry, highlighting the next generation of talent that's poised to make a lasting impact on the scene.

The xx's inclusion on the lineup is particularly noteworthy, given the British trio's influence on the independent music scene over the past decade. With their introspective, atmospheric sound and poignant lyrics, they've built a devoted following among fans of indie-rock and electronic music. Their headlining slot at Lollapalooza 2026 promises to be a highlight of the festival, with their critically acclaimed discography and captivating live performances sure to leave a lasting impression on attendees.

As the countdown to Lollapalooza 2026 begins, music fans are eagerly anticipating the opportunity to experience this star-studded lineup in person. With its diverse range of acts, from established headliners to up-and-coming talent, this year's festival promises to be an unforgettable celebration of music and culture. As the world's top artists converge on Chicago's Grant Park, one thing is certain – Lollapalooza 2026 is shaping up to be an event not to be missed.

As we look ahead to the festival season, it's clear that Lollapalooza 2026 is poised to be a major highlight. With its impressive lineup and commitment to showcasing a diverse range of musical styles, it's an event that's sure to captivate music fans of all ages and backgrounds. Whether you're a die-hard festival-goer or just looking to experience the magic of live music, Lollapalooza 2026 is an event not to be missed – mark your calendars and get ready for an unforgettable summer of music and celebration.
